---
name: Feature / snippet request
about: Suggest a new snippet, variant, or improvement
title: '[Request] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What snippet would you like to see?

<!-- e.g. "TikTok-style swipe-feed video player" or "Variable-font weight responding to scroll velocity" -->

## Where does it fit?

<!-- Which existing folder, or does it need a new one? -->
<!-- See AGENTS.md for the folder layout. -->

## Inspiration / reference

<!-- Where have you seen this pattern? URL to a Figma, product, repo, article, screenshot. -->

## Why is it useful?

<!-- What kind of project would reach for this? -->

## Does anything similar already exist?

<!-- Grep INDEX.md first. If something close exists, mention it — maybe this is a variant. -->

## Proposed API (optional)

<!-- If you have an idea for how it should be invoked: -->

```html
<div class="new-snippet" data-new></div>
```

```js
NewSnippet.init('.new-snippet', { /* options */ });
```

---

I'd be happy to contribute this myself: [ ] yes / [ ] no
